case_title: SIMA GEREVICH VS. KEVIN QUOC LI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2015 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEREVICH, SIMA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER DANIEL GAREVICH. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,780.00 FILED BY GEREVICH, SIMA AS TO DEFENDANT LI, KEVIN QUOC DBA K.DESIGN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2015 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-14-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR WRITES A CHECK FOR FULL AMOUNT OF JUDGMENT TODAY. SET FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO ASSURE CHECK CLEARS", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. CREDITOR TOLD IN COURT TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WITH THE COURT, WHEN THE CHECK CLEARS AND MAIL A COPY TO DEBTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE BY MAIL (DISCHARGE ORDER) FOR PLAITIFF SIMA GEREVICH BY MAIL RETURNED: NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEREVICH, SIMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, KEVIN QUOC DBA K.DESIGN $2,405.72 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,405.72, (NO COSTS PAID - PLAINTIFF HAS AN ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER.)
